name: Regional Parcels
description: Canonical generated parcel layer for Baltimore City, Baltimore County, Howard County, and future regional jurisdictions. Normalized fields include jurisdiction, source_parcel_id, account_id, blocklot, address, owner, land_value, improvement_value, current_value, sale_price, sale_date, year_built, and sdat_link.
reason: Generated locally from county parcel/property downloads by scripts/build_regional_parcels.py

name: Baltimore County Parcels
description: Normalized Baltimore County parcel geometry staging layer. Obtain source data from Baltimore County GIS Data Download, convert to GeoJSON, then include it in regional_parcels.geojson.
reason: County source is distributed through the Baltimore County GIS Data Download portal/FTP and may require format conversion from shapefile/geodatabase.

name: Howard County Parcels
description: Normalized Howard County parcel geometry staging layer. Obtain source data from Howard County Data Download and Viewer, convert to GeoJSON, then include it in regional_parcels.geojson.
reason: County source is distributed through Howard County GIS download services and may require format conversion from shapefile/geodatabase.

name: Real Property Information
description: City real-property records including parcel-linked ownership and assessment context.

name: Parcel
description: Official parcel boundaries used as base land-unit geometry.

name: Property Value (Parcels)
description: Derived parcel layer with estimated property value from real property records (tax base, assessed components, or sale price fallback).

name: Year Built (Parcels)
description: Derived parcel choropleth layer joining Real Property Information YEAR_BUILD onto official parcel geometry by normalized BLOCKLOT. Includes building_age_years and source metadata.
reason: Generated locally from parcel.geojson and real_property_information.geojson

name: Parcel Intelligence (Derived)
description: Derived parcel analytics layer: distress risk, investment momentum, ownership concentration, vacancy-duration proxies, tax/value ratios, chronology metrics, and relative z-scores.

name: Vacant Building Notices
description: Properties flagged with vacant-building notices and related status fields.

name: Open Notices - Vacant Code
description: Open Notices Dashboard records where Notice_Type is Vacant. This is the code-split dashboard feed, separate from the legacy Vacant Building Notices open layer. Generated from the Open Notices Dashboard feed by scripts/build_notice_code_layers.py.

name: Open Notices - Vacant Code Parcels
description: Parcel polygon join of Open Notices Dashboard Vacant records by BLOCKLOT. Includes matched_event_count, first/latest issue date, and source samples; generated by the integrated C++ parcel matcher at startup or with --force-build-parcel-matched-layers.

name: Open Notices - Exterior Code
description: Open Notices Dashboard records where Notice_Type is Exterior. Generated from the Open Notices Dashboard feed by scripts/build_notice_code_layers.py.

name: Open Notices - Exterior Code Parcels
description: Parcel polygon join of Open Notices Dashboard Exterior records by BLOCKLOT. Multiple notices per parcel are summarized with matched_event_count and latest date.

name: Open Notices - Interior Code
description: Open Notices Dashboard records where Notice_Type is Interior. Generated from the Open Notices Dashboard feed by scripts/build_notice_code_layers.py.

name: Open Notices - Interior Code Parcels
description: Parcel polygon join of Open Notices Dashboard Interior records by BLOCKLOT. Multiple notices per parcel are summarized with matched_event_count and latest date.

name: Open Notices - Interior/Exterior Code
description: Open Notices Dashboard records where Notice_Type is Interior/Exterior. Generated from the Open Notices Dashboard feed by scripts/build_notice_code_layers.py.

name: Open Notices - Interior/Exterior Code Parcels
description: Parcel polygon join of Open Notices Dashboard Interior/Exterior records by BLOCKLOT. Multiple notices per parcel are summarized with matched_event_count and latest date.

name: Open Notices - Other Code
description: Open Notices Dashboard records where Notice_Type is Other. The public Open Notices feed currently does not expose a distinct Failure-to-Abate/FTA notice type. Generated from the Open Notices Dashboard feed by scripts/build_notice_code_layers.py.

name: Open Notices - Other Code Parcels
description: Parcel polygon join of Open Notices Dashboard Other records by BLOCKLOT. Multiple notices per parcel are summarized with matched_event_count and latest date.

name: Vacant Building Rehabs
description: Vacant-building rehabilitation permit activity and project signals.

name: CodeMap Recently Rehabbed Vacant Buildings
description: CodeMap Datamax point layer for recently rehabbed vacant buildings since 2022. Strong public success proxy; generated from dmxLandPlanning/MapServer/38 by scripts/build_codemap_rehab_layers.py.

name: CodeMap Recently Rehabbed Vacant Building Parcels
description: Parcel polygon join of CodeMap Recently Rehabbed Vacant Buildings points by BLOCKLOT. Use for parcel fill and owner/filter joins; generated by the integrated C++ parcel matcher at startup or with --force-build-parcel-matched-layers.

name: CodeMap Recently Rehabbed VBN Parcels
description: CodeMap Datamax parcel polygon layer for recently rehabbed vacant building notices since 2022. Use for parcel fill/joins; generated from dmxLandPlanning/MapServer/27 by scripts/build_codemap_rehab_layers.py.

name: Tax Lien Certificate Sale Properties
description: Properties listed for tax lien certificate sale processes.

name: 2021 Tax Sale List
description: Published 2021 tax sale list for delinquent properties.

name: Open Bid List - Vacants to Value
description: Open bids for Vacants to Value redevelopment opportunities.

name: Completed City Demo
description: Locations where city demolition work has been completed.

name: Housing and Building Permits 2019-Present
description: Housing and building permits from 2019 to present.

name: MD DHCD Multifamily Sites
description: Maryland DHCD/iMAP multifamily rental development sites financed, rehabilitated, preserved, or supported through DHCD housing programs.
reason: Generated by scripts/pull_md_dhcd_housing_layers.py from the paginated Maryland iMAP ArcGIS API

name: MD DHCD Targeted Areas
description: Maryland DHCD/iMAP targeted areas for housing program eligibility and related federal housing criteria.
reason: Generated by scripts/pull_md_dhcd_housing_layers.py from the paginated Maryland iMAP ArcGIS API

name: MD DHCD Qualified Census Tracts
description: Maryland DHCD/iMAP Qualified Census Tracts used for Low-Income Housing Tax Credit and related housing eligibility analysis.
reason: Generated by scripts/pull_md_dhcd_housing_layers.py from the paginated Maryland iMAP ArcGIS API

name: MD DHCD Communities of Opportunity
description: Maryland DHCD/iMAP Communities of Opportunity polygons based on economic, health, and education factors.
reason: Generated by scripts/pull_md_dhcd_housing_layers.py from the paginated Maryland iMAP ArcGIS API

name: MD DHCD Small Difficult Development Areas
description: Maryland DHCD/iMAP Small Difficult Development Area polygons for affordable-housing development context.
reason: Generated by scripts/pull_md_dhcd_housing_layers.py from the paginated Maryland iMAP ArcGIS API

name: MD DHCD Rural Areas
description: Maryland DHCD/iMAP rural area designations used in housing program analysis.
reason: Generated by scripts/pull_md_dhcd_housing_layers.py from the paginated Maryland iMAP ArcGIS API

name: MD DHCD BRHP Opportunity Designations
description: Maryland DHCD/iMAP BRHP opportunity designations for housing mobility and opportunity-area context.
reason: Generated by scripts/pull_md_dhcd_housing_layers.py from the paginated Maryland iMAP ArcGIS API

name: MD DHCD Baltimore County Opportunity Areas
description: Maryland DHCD/iMAP Baltimore County opportunity area polygons for regional housing-development context.
reason: Generated by scripts/pull_md_dhcd_housing_layers.py from the paginated Maryland iMAP ArcGIS API

name: MD DHCD Just Communities
description: Maryland DHCD/iMAP Just Communities polygons for state housing and community-development analysis.
reason: Generated by scripts/pull_md_dhcd_housing_layers.py from the paginated Maryland iMAP ArcGIS API

name: Zoning
description: Current zoning districts and zoning-code geography.

name: Streets
description: Street centerlines for Baltimore City road network geometry and attributes.

name: Major Drainage
description: Major drainage network and watershed-related infrastructure geometry.

name: Water (Infrastructure Layer 19)
description: Water infrastructure features from city infrastructure map layer 19.

name: Rate of Clogged Storm Drain Reports (CSA)
description: CSA-level rate of clogged storm drain service reports.

name: Median Price of Homes Sold (CSA)
description: CSA-level median home sale price indicator.

name: Total Number of Businesses (CSA)
description: CSA-level total count of registered businesses.

name: Life Expectancy (CSA)
description: Baltimore City Health Department life expectancy indicator by Community Statistical Area.

name: CDC PLACES Asthma (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of current asthma in Baltimore City.

name: CDC PLACES Diabetes (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of diagnosed diabetes in Baltimore City.

name: CDC PLACES Obesity (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of obesity in Baltimore City.

name: CDC PLACES Stroke (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of stroke among adults in Baltimore City.

name: CDC PLACES Depression (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of diagnosed depression in Baltimore City.

name: CDC PLACES Total Population (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level total population and adult population denominators for Baltimore City.

name: CDC PLACES No Health Insurance (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of adults without health insurance in Baltimore City (with 95% CI).

name: CDC PLACES Annual Checkup (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of adults with an annual routine checkup in Baltimore City (with 95% CI).

name: CDC PLACES High Blood Pressure (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of high blood pressure in Baltimore City (with 95% CI).

name: CDC PLACES Coronary Heart Disease (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of coronary heart disease in Baltimore City (with 95% CI).

name: CDC PLACES Current Smoking (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of current smoking in Baltimore City (with 95% CI).

name: CDC PLACES Physical Inactivity (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of no leisure-time physical activity in Baltimore City (with 95% CI).

name: CDC PLACES Frequent Mental Distress (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC PLACES tract-level modeled prevalence (%) of frequent mental distress in Baltimore City (with 95% CI).

name: CDC SVI 2022 (Baltimore Tracts)
description: CDC/ATSDR Social Vulnerability Index 2022 tract percentiles for Baltimore City (national comparison).

name: HMDA Mortgage Activity 2024 (Baltimore Tracts)
description: Tract-level 2024 HMDA mortgage activity for Baltimore City derived from FFIEC/CFPB HMDA Data Browser API (applications, originations, denials, loan volume, denial rate).
reason: Generated locally by aggregating HMDA API CSV and joining to tract geometry

name: HUD Continuum of Care Boundaries (Maryland)
description: HUD Continuum of Care (CoC) boundary polygons for Maryland CoCs. Use as planning geography for homelessness service-system analysis and PIT/HIC joins.

name: HUD Continuum of Care Boundary (Baltimore City CoC MD-503)
description: HUD CoC boundary for Baltimore City (MD-503), the primary reporting geography for PIT/HIC homelessness statistics in Baltimore City.

name: HUD PIT Homelessness Trends by CoC (2007-2024)
description: Generated CoC-level PIT homelessness trend layer (2007-2024) by joining HUD AHAR PIT tables to HUD CoC boundary geometry.
reason: Generated locally from HUD USER PIT files and CoC boundary geometry

name: NIBRS Group A Crime Data (2022-Present)
description: NIBRS Group A incident-level crime data (2022-present).

name: Part 1 Crime Data (Legacy SRS)
description: Legacy Part I (SRS-era) crime incidents for historical trend analysis.
